name: oxford
description: Formal structure: opening statements, two rebuttal rounds, closing statements. No new evidence may be introduced in closing statements.
rules: Each statement must address the motion directly.
Rebuttals must respond to at least one specific point made by the opponent.
No new evidence may be introduced during closing statements.
Every factual claim should cite the source_id of a source actually consulted via the evidence server; fabricated citations are penalised harder than missing ones.
Personal attacks and appeals to emotion in place of argument are penalised.
